home.title: Market intelligence for traders and analysts.
home.subtitle: Mavrynt brings market signals, price context, and news into one analytical workspace — so you can read the market faster and act with clarity.

stat.label: Built for serious analysis
stat.value: Market data, signals, and news context unified in one view

logos.title: Trusted by traders and analysts at

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to monitor, interpret, and react to the market — in one focused workspace.

monitoring.title: Real-time market monitoring
monitoring.desc: Track Forex pairs, indices, and commodities as they move — with a clean read on price, volatility, and session context.

signals.title: Signal aggregation
signals.desc: Bring technical, momentum, and contextual signals into one feed, each annotated with the data behind it so you can judge relevance fast.

trends.title: Trend & momentum analysis
trends.desc: Surface trend structure, momentum shifts, and volatility regimes across instruments — without jumping between charts.

context.title: News & market context
context.desc: Pair price action with relevant news, economic calendar events, and macro drivers so signals never arrive without context.

watchlists.title: Watchlists & instrument focus
watchlists.desc: Organize the instruments that matter to you into focused watchlists, with per-list alerts and analytical layouts.

alerts.title: Structured alerts
alerts.desc: Configure alerts on signals, price levels, and news events — delivered in a structured way, so notifications stay useful, not noisy.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three steps from raw market noise to structured insight.

1.title: Track the markets you care about
1.desc: Select Forex pairs, indices, or commodities and build focused watchlists around the instruments you actually trade or analyze.

2.title: Analyze signals and context
2.desc: See signals, price structure, and news context in one view — each data point paired with the reason it showed up.

3.title: Act faster with clearer reads
3.desc: Make discretionary decisions with more confidence, or hand off a structured read to your team — Mavrynt supports the call, you make it.

pricing.subtitle: Straightforward plans for individual traders, analysts, and teams. No hidden fees.

testimonials.title: Built for how traders and analysts actually work
testimonials.subtitle: Early perspectives from traders and analysts exploring Mavrynt as their daily market workspace.

1.quote: Having signals, price context, and the news that drives them in one view means I spend less time hopping between tools and more time making a decision.
1.author: Discretionary FX trader

2.quote: What I value is the structure. The signals arrive with context — I can see why something moved, not just that it did.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out — we answer every message.

1.a: Mavrynt focuses on Forex majors and minors, plus major index and commodity CFDs. Coverage of additional instruments is expanded based on user feedback.

2.a: No. Mavrynt is a market analysis platform — we don't execute orders, hold client funds, or act as a regulated broker. We help you interpret the market; execution stays with your broker of choice.

3.a: No. Mavrynt is a decision-support tool, not a trading guarantee. It aggregates signals, context, and news so you can analyze faster — it does not promise profits or remove market risk.

4.q: How are signals generated and interpreted?
4.a: Signals combine quantitative market data (price, momentum, volatility) with contextual sources (news, economic calendar). Each one is presented with the data behind it so you can judge relevance, not just react to a number.

5.a: Yes. Pro and Enterprise plans support shared watchlists, notes, and alert channels so traders and analysts can work from the same market view.

6.a: Discretionary traders who need faster market context, independent analysts who need structured reads, and firms that want a shared analytical workspace for their desk or research team.
